modules.title: CTC Simulation Stability Engine
modules.description: Prüft CTC-Lohr Scope, Blockzeiten, Eingabeaufgaben, FlowLogic-Finalblock und Negativ-Scope gegen BPS/Training/andere Berufsfelder.

modules.title: Phase29 CTC Admin Block Reporting Engine
modules.description: Modelliert den echten CTC-Lohr Ablauf als 6-Blöcke-Prüfung mit Allgemeinwissen 7 Min, Mathe 22 Sek, Regelrechnung Eingabe, Buchstaben-Eingabe, Tabellen-Eingabe und 13-Minuten-FlowLogic.

modules.title: CTC FlowLogic Adapter
modules.description: Integriert FlowLogic ausschließlich in Simulation → IT/FISI → CTC mit 13-Minuten-Wenn-Dann-Ablaufaufgabe.

modules.title: Profile Auth Domain Engine
modules.description: Kapselt lokale Profilidentität, AuthProfileShell, EGTAuthEngine, Gate-Status, Demo-Zähler und Highscore-Identity als stabile Userbereich-Fassade.

modules.title: Admin Portal Domain Engine
modules.description: Kapselt Admin-/Dozentenportal, Teilnehmer, Codes, Rollen, Tickets, Sync und Duell-Portal-APIs als stabile Domain-Facade.

modules.title: Question Flow Engine
modules.description: Kapselt Quiz-Lifecycle, Fragensteuerung und öffentliche Question-Control-Aufrufe.

modules.title: Quiz Build Pipeline Engine
modules.description: Kapselt BuildQuiz, Generator-Auswahl, Branch-Pool-Auflösung und Aufgaben-Orchestrierung.
Zentrales Routing für Testabschluss, Auswertungsanzeige und Ergebnis-Persistence-Hooks.
Zentrales Routing für Highscore-/Duell-Sheets, TopTabs und Data-Actions.

release: G54.4 / Phase29 CTC Admin Block Reporting

simulationModuleHost.api: window.EGTSimulation.start(config) + control API + renderStandardAnswers(q) + renderRouteSequenceAnswers(q) + route interaction API + renderEdvMultiAnswers(q) + EDV interaction API + module-owned updateQuestionNav() + prepareResult(options)
simulationModuleHost.adapter: app.js:initSimulationModuleHost() exposes beginRun + controlled hooks for drawer/jump/total/time/result, Route-Memory history/progress hooks and EDV visual/history/progress/navigation hooks; Standard-MC, Route-Memory answer UI, EDV-Multi answer UI, question navigation and result header preparation are handled inside egt-simulation-engine.js
simulationModuleHost.status: active control layer; Standard-Multiple-Choice rendering, Route-Memory answer rendering/interactions, EDV-Multi answer rendering/interactions, question navigation and result summary/header are handled by EGTSimulation; visual renderers, result detail areas, highscore and coach remain deliberate shell hooks

movedIntoModule: drawer closing before question jump via controlled shell hook
leftInAppAsAdapter: result detail rendering, review, highscore/coach sync
phase2d.nextStep: Phase 2G completed EDV-Multi. Next: Phase 2H may migrate visual render boundaries or begin Phase 3 shell/module contract hardening.

movedIntoModule: routeMemory answer waiting message before routeReady
leftInAppAsControlledHooks: recordRouteAnswer(selected, correct) writes existing history payload
isAdaptiveElite() keeps adaptive continuation rule in shell
nextQuestion() and showResult() remain canonical navigation/result rules
clearRouteTimers() remains part of shell stopTimer hook
leftInAppAsAdapter: result detail rendering, review, highscore/coach sync
phase2f.nextStep: Phase 2G completed EDV-Multi as the second special renderer. Visual renderers remain intentionally in app.js.

movedIntoModule: module event emission for edv:rendered, edv:selected, edv:submitted
leftInAppAsControlledHooks: renderEdvVisual(question) keeps existing EDV visual schema HTML and node ids
recordEdvMultiAnswers(selected) writes existing per-error history payload
markEdvMultiCoveredDone(need) updates placeholder questions and score
afterEdvMultiSubmit(need, selected) keeps canonical nextQuestion/showResult navigation rule
leftInAppAsAdapter: toggleEdvMultiNodeInternal / undoEdvMultiSelectionInternal / clearEdvMultiSelectionInternal / submitEdvMultiAnswerInternal remain fallback only
renderEdvProHTML remains shell visual HTML source
EDV_SCHEMA / EDV_ERRORS / Generator.bigEDVMulti remain shell data-generator responsibility
explicitlyNotMoved: question generation and ctcLohr block assembly
result detail rendering, review, highscore and coach sync
phase2g.nextStep: Phase 2H optional: define visual-renderer boundary or move one small visual renderer. Otherwise Phase 3 can start with Shell/ModuleHost contract cleanup.

phase3Integration.moduleHost: js/core/module-host.js creates branch-aware simulation config and passes branch/moduleHost metadata into EGTSimulation.start(config) through app.js:startQuiz()
phase3Integration.uiRouter: js/ui-router.js understands data-ui-action="start-branch-simulation" and direct-starts the selected branch via AppModuleHost.startSimulation(...)
phase3Integration.uiHome: js/ui-home-renderer.js renders branch-specific simulation cards inside the existing Deep Sheet instead of a blind one-button start

moduleHost.purpose: Hardens Shell + ModuleHost + Module contract. Owns branch context and controlled branch-aware simulation entry without moving quiz generation yet.
moduleHost.nextStep: Phase 5 should split branch-specific simulations into copy-safe modules or Phase 4B can further extract practice task selection/generator boundaries.

home.purpose: Home/Shell start as a real module; refreshes home shell through App.setAppSection or EGTUILayer fallback.

simulation-entry.purpose: Simulation entry module; opens existing simulation Deep Sheet or direct-starts through AppModuleHost.startSimulation.

practice-entry.purpose: Practice/Learn entry module; opens existing practice/learn Deep Sheet through EGTUILayer/App fallback.

admin-entry.purpose: Admin/Login portal entry boundary; opens existing EGTAdminPortal via AppModuleHost without changing admin business logic.

profile-entry.purpose: Profile/Auth entry boundary; delegates auth/profile actions to existing EGTAuthProfileShell via AppModuleHost.

coach-entry.purpose: Coach entry boundary; opens existing EGTLearningCoach hub via AppModuleHost without changing coach logic.

analysis-entry.purpose: Analysis/progress entry boundary; delegates to existing App.showAnalysis or progress UI fallback.

highscore-entry.purpose: Highscore entry boundary; opens existing EGTUILayer highscore sheet or refreshes CloudHighscoreEngine fallback.

duel-entry.purpose: Duel entry boundary; opens existing duel hub or direct App.openDuellSetup without changing duel business logic.

practice.purpose: Phase 4 Fachmodul für freies Lernen/Üben; renders calm practice library, coach help and starts existing training modes through App.chooseTrainingMode/App.prepareTest.

routerIntegration: ui-router practice/learn actions now try AppModuleHost.startModule("practice-entry", ...) first
ui-router simulation direct-start now tries AppModuleHost.startModule("simulation-entry", {direct:true}) first
ui-router non-direct simulation opens SimulationEntry before legacy fallback
serviceWorker: new module files added to ASSETS
leftInAppAsControlledHooks: EGTUILayer.openSheet/openActionMenu remains canonical Deep Sheet UI
phase3b.riskBoundary: No generator/result/highscore rewrite. Phase 3B only introduces module registration and entry routing.

routerIntegration: auth-* and profile-* actions now try AppModuleHost.startModule("profile-entry", ...) before AuthProfileShell fallback
admin-open and login-open-core now try AppModuleHost.startModule("admin-entry", ...) before EGTAdminPortal fallback
bottom dock home tab now tries AppModuleHost.startModule("home", ...) before legacy switchTab fallback
bottom dock profile tab now tries AppModuleHost.startModule("profile-entry", {action:"profile-open"}) before legacy switchTab fallback
serviceWorker: new admin/profile entry module files added to ASSETS
cache bumped to egt-trainer-g41-2 via sync-version.js
leftAsAdapters: EGTAdminPortal remains canonical admin UI/business logic
EGTAuthProfileShell remains canonical auth/profile UI/business logic
Highscore, Coach, Analysis, Duels are not migrated in Phase 3C
phase3c.riskBoundary: Phase 3C only moves entry routing and lifecycle boundaries. No admin/profile data schema, Firebase config, session keys, or business logic were changed.

routerIntegration: coach and coach-open-core now try AppModuleHost.startModule("coach-entry", ...) before legacy coach fallback
analysis and analysis-open-core now try AppModuleHost.startModule("analysis-entry", ...) before legacy analysis/progress fallback
highscore-sheet now tries AppModuleHost.startModule("highscore-entry", ...) before legacy EGTUILayer highscore fallback
duel-hub and duel-mode now try AppModuleHost.startModule("duel-entry", ...) before legacy duel fallback
coach_card and analyse_card module targets now route through the matching Entry modules
serviceWorker: new coach/analysis/highscore/duel entry module files added to ASSETS
cache bumped to egt-trainer-g41-3 via sync-version.js
leftAsAdapters: EGTLearningCoach remains canonical coach UI/business logic
EGTUILayer.openHighscoreSheet and CloudHighscoreEngine remain canonical highscore UI/sync logic
EGTUILayer.openDuelSheet and App.openDuellSetup remain canonical duel UI/business logic
phase3d.riskBoundary: Phase 3D only moves entry routing/lifecycle boundaries. No highscore schema, coach memory, analysis calculation, duel state, Firebase config or simulation runtime was changed.

phase4.purpose: Freies Lern-/Übungsmodul als echtes Fachmodul auf Basis von Shell + AppModuleHost. PracticeEntry delegiert zuerst an EGTPracticeModule.
uiContract: Kategorien für Mathe, Logik, Konzentration, Sprache/Wissen, IT/FISI
klare Abgrenzung: keine Simulation, kein harter Prüfungsdruck
Platzhalter für Live-Chat, Coach-Frage und Duell-Anfrage vorbereitet
runtimeIntegration: Start ausgewählter Übung nutzt vorhandene App.chooseTrainingMode(mode) und App.prepareTest()
leftAsAdapters: eigentliche Übungsaufgaben laufen weiterhin über vorhandene Quizruntime/EGTSimulation-Adapter
phase4.riskBoundary: Phase 4 ändert keine Generatoren, keine Simulation, keine Highscore-/Coach-Auswertung, keine Admin-/Auth-/Firebase-Logik.

phase5BranchSimulationModules.goal: IT/FISI, Kaufmännisch und Sozialpädagogik als eigene branchenspezifische Simulationsmodule über AppModuleHost registrieren.
routing: simulation-entry direct start delegates to branch module when available
ui-home-renderer startModule uses branch-specific simulation module when available
keptLegacy: buildQuiz, Generators, Result, Highscore, Coach and branch question bank selection remain in app.js/data layer
phase5BranchSimulationModules.nextPhase: Phase 6: branchenspezifische QuestionPool-/Generator-Grenze definieren oder Datenbank-Pool-Resolver extrahieren.

phase6BranchQuestionPools.goal: Branchenspezifische QuestionPool-/Generator-Grenze für IT/FISI, Kaufmännisch und Sozialpädagogik definieren und kontrolliert an buildQuiz anbinden.

branchProfiles.it: preserves CTC-Lohr block structure and supplies IT/FISI/EDV pool metadata
branchProfiles.kaufm: weights BPS/Jogging generation toward kaufmännisches Rechnen, Bürowissen, Textverständnis and concentration
branchProfiles.sozial: weights BPS/Jogging generation toward Pädagogik, Situationen, Textverständnis and concentration

runtimeIntegration: Branch simulation modules resolve and pass questionPoolProfile
app.js buildQuiz/generateQuestionForMode reads EGTBranchQuestionPools and applies weighted branch pools for bps/jogging while preserving legacy fallbacks
keptLegacy: CTC-Lohr fixed block sequence remains preserved
QuestionBank import and validation remain unchanged
phase6BranchQuestionPools.nextPhase: Phase 7: optional physical extraction of generator registry/pools from app.js or dedicated branch question-bank resolver per data file.

phase7.purpose: Generator-Pool-Definitionen aus app.js herauslösen und über EGTGeneratorRegistry.resolvePool(...) anbinden.
phase7.next: Phase 8 wurde erledigt; Phase 9 erstellt eine QuestionFactory-Grenze für generateQuestionForMode.

phase7_5SmokeTestHandoff.nextDecision: Evaluate user screenshots and fix blockers before Phase 8 if necessary.

phase8.next: Phase 9: generateQuestionForMode über EGTQuestionFactory kontrolliert aus app.js lösen.

handoffG46_1.status: historical handoff; Phase 9 completed in G47.0
handoffG46_1.currentArchitecture: Shell + AppModuleHost + EGTSimulation + Entry-Module + Practice-Modul + Branch-Sim-Module + BranchQuestionPools + GeneratorRegistry + QuizOrchestrator
handoffG46_1.nextGoal: generateQuestionForMode / QuestionBank- und Datenpool-Grenzen weiter aus js/app.js herauslösen

appBoundary.orchestratorHook: js/app.js:buildQuiz() calls generateQuestionForMode(...) for ctc and non-ctc core questions

phase9.next: Phase 10: QuestionBanks / Datenpools pro Branch sauberer strukturieren.

phase10.goal: QuestionBanks und Datenpools pro Branch über eine eigene Routing-Schicht strukturieren, ohne Dateninhalte, Generatoren, UI oder Fallbacks riskant zu verändern.

appBoundary.fromQuestionBank: js/app.js:fromQuestionBank() nutzt jetzt routeQuestionBankCandidates(...) und delegiert Kandidatenwahl an EGTQuestionBankRouter.resolve(...)
appBoundary.bootstrap: bootstrapExternalQuestionBank() legt optional QUESTION_BANK.branchIndex aus EGTQuestionBankRouter.index(...) ab
appBoundary.questionFactoryHook: Der QuestionFactory-Callback übergibt den aktiven modeOverride an fromQuestionBank(...)
appBoundary.fallback: Wenn EGTQuestionBankRouter fehlt oder fehlschlägt, greift legacyQuestionBankCandidates(...) mit alter QuestionBankEngine.filter-Logik.

branchRouting.kaufm: priorisiert kaufmännische Gruppen, Kategorien und Tags wie Rabatt, Skonto, Büro, Verwaltung
branchRouting.sozial: priorisiert pädagogische und soziale Gruppen, Kategorien und Tags wie Entwicklung, Bindung, Beobachtung

keptLegacy: QuestionBankEngine bleibt in app.js als Runtime-Engine erhalten
phase10.next: Phase 11: Result / Review / Fehleranalyse als eigene Grenze modularisieren oder zuvor User-Smoke-Test für G48.0 durchführen.

phase11.goal: Ergebniszusammenfassung, Kategorieauswertung, Tipps, Fehler-Review und Analyse-Rendering als eigene Core-Grenze aus js/app.js herauslösen, ohne Speicherung/Highscore/UI-Feinschliff riskant zu ändern.

appBoundary.showResult: js/app.js nutzt EGTResultReviewEngine.buildSummary/renderResultHeader im Shell-Fallback, EGTSimulation.prepareResult bleibt bevorzugter Pfad.
appBoundary.categoryStats: renderCategoryStats() delegiert zuerst an EGTResultReviewEngine.renderCategoryStats(...), alter Inline-Code bleibt Fallback.
appBoundary.tips: renderTips() delegiert zuerst an EGTResultReviewEngine.renderTips(...), alter Inline-Code bleibt Fallback.
appBoundary.review: renderReview() delegiert zuerst an EGTResultReviewEngine.renderReview(...), alter Inline-Code bleibt Fallback.
appBoundary.saveResult: Kategorie-Payload wird über EGTResultReviewEngine.buildCategoryMap(...) gebaut, alte Map-Logik bleibt Fallback.
appBoundary.analysis: showAnalysis() delegiert Analyse-HTML zuerst an EGTResultReviewEngine.renderAnalysis(...), alter Inline-Code bleibt Fallback.

keptLegacy: alte Result-/Tips-/Review-/Analysis-Codepfade bleiben als Fallback in app.js
keine CSS- oder Layout-Shift-Fixes in Phase 11
phase11.next: Phase 12: Persistenz/Highscore/Coach-Hooks weiter entkoppeln oder zuvor Browser-Smoke-Test für G49.0 durchführen.

phase12.goal: Speichern, Result-Payload, lokale Highscore-Aktualisierung, CloudHighscore-Sync sowie Coach-/Admin-/Demo-Hooks als eigene Core-Grenze aus js/app.js herauslösen, ohne StorageEngine, CloudHighscoreEngine oder Auth-Logik physisch zu verschieben.

appBoundary.saveResult: js/app.js:saveResult() ist jetzt Wrapper über EGTResultPersistenceEngine.persistResult(...); alter Speichercode bleibt als saveResultInternal(...) erhalten.
appBoundary.recordAnswer: Antwort-Hooks für EGTLearningCoach und EGTCoachDNA laufen zuerst über EGTResultPersistenceEngine.recordAnswerAttempt(...); alter Hookpfad bleibt Fallback.
appBoundary.showResult: Session-Finish-Hook läuft über EGTResultPersistenceEngine.finishCoachSession(...); alte EGTLearningCoach.onSessionFinished-Logik bleibt Fallback.
appBoundary.context: js/app.js:resultPersistenceContext(...) übergibt kontrollierte Hooks, Engines und App-State an die neue Core-Grenze.

keptLegacy: StorageEngine, DatabaseBridge, HighscoreEngine und CloudHighscoreEngine bleiben in app.js als bestehende Runtime-Engines erhalten
AuthProfileShell, AdminPortal und CoachDNA werden nicht fachlich verändert
keine CSS- oder Layout-Shift-Fixes in Phase 12
phase12.next: G50.5: Layout-Stabilität / No-Shift-Fix anhand User-Smoke-Test und Screenshots oder Phase 13: Highscore/Cloud physisch weiter aus app.js trennen.

phase13_home_lifecycle_cleanup.goal: Fix fuer User-Smoke-Test: Nach Testende/Auswertung muss Zurueck zur Startseite einen harten Home-Screenwechsel ausfuehren, Simulation/Result aus dem Dokumentfluss entfernen und alle Scrollcontainer auf 0 setzen.

appBoundary.cleanup: goHomeHard stoppt Timer, ModuleHost-Simulation, Overlays, Drawer, Runtime-DOM, Body-Klassen und Scrollpositionen.
appBoundary.interruptedRuns: Falls Home waehrend eines aktiven Tests erreicht wird, werden offene Antworten streng gewertet und gespeichert, bevor Home gerendert wird.

phase13_home_lifecycle_cleanup.simulationEngine: EGTSimulation.abort(reason) ueberschreibt bereits finished Sessions nicht mehr als aborted; Home-Cleanup schliesst nur Flags/Timer.
phase13_home_lifecycle_cleanup.next: Browser-/Geraete-Smoke-Test: Result -> Zurueck zur Startseite auf Desktop, iPad, iPhone pruefen. Danach Layout-Shift/Darstellungsfehler gesammelt fixen.

entries.title: Answer Stability / Layout Guard Fix
changes: layout-guard no longer removes training-cockpit after question render
answer card touch-hover transform disabled on coarse pointers
answer container stabilized with containment layer

entries.title: Appwide Spacing / Visual Polish Fix
changes: new final CSS spacing override loaded after all existing styles
unified button min-heights, gaps, hitboxes and card padding across Home, Sheets, Gate, Coach, Profile, Result and Simulation
visual smoke checks added for home, sheets and simulation skeletons

entries.title: Appwide Grid Density / Visual Audit Fix
changes: new final css/ui-density-grid-polish.css loaded after ui-spacing-polish.css
larger unified grid gaps for result category cards, highscore/duel cards, admin cards and simulation controls
hidden display safety restored so layout overrides cannot reveal hidden screens
result bigScore fixed to remain circular inside grid layouts
headless Chromium visual audit passed for desktop, iPad landscape and iPhone profiles

entries.title: Phase 16 Highscore-/Duell-UI Engine
changes: new js/core/highscore-duel-ui-engine.js with duel setup, duel comparison, avatar, time, winner and highscoreData render adapters
app.js now delegates Highscore-/Duell-UI rendering to HighscoreDuelUIEngine while keeping runtime/control flow in App
index.html, service-worker cache and module manifest updated for the new Fachmodul boundary

releases.title: Answer Stability / Layout Guard Fix
changes: layout-guard no longer removes training-cockpit after question render
answer card touch-hover transform disabled on coarse pointers
answer container stabilized with containment layer

releases.title: Appwide Spacing / Visual Polish Fix
changes: new final CSS spacing override loaded after all existing styles
unified button min-heights, gaps, hitboxes and card padding across Home, Sheets, Gate, Coach, Profile, Result and Simulation
visual smoke checks added for home, sheets and simulation skeletons

releases.title: Appwide Grid Density / Visual Audit Fix
changes: new final css/ui-density-grid-polish.css loaded after ui-spacing-polish.css
larger unified grid gaps for result category cards, highscore/duel cards, admin cards and simulation controls
hidden display safety restored so layout overrides cannot reveal hidden screens
result bigScore fixed to remain circular inside grid layouts
headless Chromium visual audit passed for desktop, iPad landscape and iPhone profiles

releases.title: Phase 14 Highscore Dashboard Engine
changes: new js/core/highscore-dashboard-engine.js with local highscore/dashboard API
app.js HighscoreEngine now uses core engine factory with inline fallback
ArchitectureGuard and service worker know the new core file
headless inline smoke confirmed G52.0, EGTHighscoreDashboardEngine and HighscoreEngine version G52.0-phase14

releases.title: Phase 16 Highscore-/Duell-UI Engine
changes: new js/core/highscore-duel-ui-engine.js with duel setup, duel comparison, avatar, time, winner and highscoreData render adapters
app.js now delegates Highscore-/Duell-UI rendering to HighscoreDuelUIEngine while keeping runtime/control flow in App
index.html, service-worker cache and module manifest updated for the new Fachmodul boundary

releases.title: Phase 17 Duell Runtime Engine
changes: new js/core/duell-runtime-engine.js with local duel flow, online create/join, polling, result transfer and setup overlay control
app.js keeps public App wrappers but delegates runtime work to DuellRuntimeEngine
architecture guard, service worker cache and module manifest updated for the new runtime boundary

releases.title: Highscore/Duell Sheet Router Engine
releases.summary: Highscore-/Duell-Sheet-Routing zentralisiert. Entry-Module, App-TopTabs und Data-Actions delegieren an js/core/highscore-duel-sheet-router-engine.js.

phase14_appwide_grid_density_polish.goal: Appweite Kachel-, Grid- und Button-Abstaende sichtbar vereinheitlichen; Ergebnis-Auswertung, Simulation, Highscore, Duell und Admin/Dozent visuell stabilisieren.
phase14_appwide_grid_density_polish.next: Echter Geraete-Smoke-Test: Desktop Chrome, iPad, iPhone; Spezialseiten bei Auffaelligkeit per Screenshot nachziehen.

visualPolishFixes.label: iOS + Coach + iPad QNav Polish Fix

phase14_highscore_dashboard_engine.goal: Lokale Highscore-/Dashboard-Logik aus app.js in eine eigene Core-Grenze auslagern, ohne Cloud-, Result-, Admin- oder Firebase-Fachlogik riskant umzubauen.
fallbacks: Alte Inline-HighscoreEngine bleibt als Fallback in app.js erhalten, falls das neue Core-Modul fehlt.
CloudHighscoreEngine bleibt unverändert und wird nur über getCloudHighscoreEngine() angebunden.
phase14_highscore_dashboard_engine.next: Phase 15: Duell-/Highscore-UI oder CloudHighscoreEngine weiter physisch aus app.js lösen; alternativ Spezial-UI-Backlog nach Screenshots abarbeiten.

phase15CloudHighscoreEngine.purpose: Cloud-/Supabase-Highscore-Logik aus app.js herauslösen und als Core-Fachgrenze bereitstellen.
phase15CloudHighscoreEngine.appAdapter: app.js erzeugt CloudHighscoreEngine über window.EGTCloudHighscoreEngine.create(...) und exposed window.CloudHighscoreEngine
phase15CloudHighscoreEngine.fallback: app.js behält einen Minimal-Fallback, falls das Modul nicht geladen wird.
phase15CloudHighscoreEngine.premiumBridge: js/modules/highscore-engine.js darf weiterhin Premium-Renderer/Cloud-Funktionen in das Core-Objekt mischen.

phase16HighscoreDuelUIEngine.appIntegration: app.js delegates duellAvatarHtml, renderDuellComparison, openDuellSetup and highscoreData to the Fachmodul
phase16HighscoreDuelUIEngine.keptInApp: Duell runtime state, online polling, quiz lifecycle and Supabase portal calls stay in app.js for now
phase16HighscoreDuelUIEngine.nextSuggestedPhase: Phase 17 completed: Duell runtime/control flow moved to js/core/duell-runtime-engine.js

phase17DuellRuntimeEngine.appIntegration: app.js delegates local duel, online duel create/join, polling, result handover, retry, rematch and exit to DuellRuntimeEngine
phase17DuellRuntimeEngine.keptInApp: general quiz lifecycle, buildQuiz/startQuiz, admin portal implementation and non-duel result rendering stay in app.js for now
phase17DuellRuntimeEngine.nextSuggestedPhase: Phase 18: Highscore-/Duell-Sheet-Routing modularisieren oder allgemeinen Quiz-Lifecycle weiter aus app.js lösen

phase24CoachAnalysisDomainEngine.title: Phase 24 Coach / Analyse / Fehlerprofil Domain Engine
phase24CoachAnalysisDomainEngine.purpose: KI-Coach, Lernanalyse, Fehlerprofil, Empfehlungen, adaptive Schwierigkeit und Analyse-Rendering als eigene Domain-Fassade abgrenzen.
phase24CoachAnalysisDomainEngine.appIntegration: app.js erzeugt CoachAnalysisDomainEngine und delegiert showAnalysis, setTrainingFocus und Coach-Build-Zugriffe an die neue Domain-Engine.
keptStable: Bestehende CoachEngine/AnalyticsEngine/SessionTracker/ErrorMemory bleiben als interne Fachadapter erhalten.
ResultReviewEngine bleibt bevorzugter Renderer fuer Analyse, Domain-Engine liefert Fallback.
phase24CoachAnalysisDomainEngine.nextSuggestedPhase: Phase 25: Finale QA-Orchestrierung / App Health / Release-Check oder tiefere Zerlegung der Coach-Subengines.

phase25ReleaseQAEngine.title: Phase 25 Release-QA / Multi-Device Visual Simulation
phase25ReleaseQAEngine.purpose: Appweite Release-Health-Prüfung mit DOM-/Layout-Metriken, Engine-Verfügbarkeit und Multi-Device-Smoke-Test-Dokumentation.
